message:
feat: Add WASM JSON parser and clean up tokenizer code

Changes:
- Add manual JSON parser in tokenizer.zig for WASM (std.json doesn't work in freestanding)
- Update WASM bindings with proper error handling
- Add gitignore for test files and build artifacts
- Remove tracked binary files (bench_cl100k)

The JSON parser is inline in tokenizer.zig initFromData() - no duplicate files.

files.patch:
@@ -6,3 +6,18 @@ zig-out/
 .zig-cache/
 tokendagger-*/
 *.tar.gz
+
+# Test files
+test_*.zig
+test_*.js
+accuracy_test*.py
+
+# Build artifacts
+*.a
+bench_trainer
+bench_cl100k
+test_tokendagger
+bench_tokendagger_pure.c
+
+# Temp files
+temp_spm.*
